title: Purple 7 Balloons 40 Inch Large Foil Number 7 Balloons Purple Big Helium Balloon Birthday Foil Balloon Party Decorations Supplies (Purple Number 7）
features: Purple Number Balloons Decorations: Do you want an elegant purple number balloon for celebrating birthday? The giant number balloon is suit to birthday party decorations and anniversary events, easy to express the theme of the party and create a touching atmosphere for guests

Material: Material of digital number ballons is foil, color uniform, spherical beautiful. This beautiful balloon is great for children's birthdays, parties! 40 inch purple number balloon, you can choose the digital you want from number 0 to 9 balloons for your party occasion

Photo Prop: It has a huge size and beautiful color visual effects. This helium balloons decorations supplies suits for a wedding, christening, anniversary, engagement, birthday, baby shower and all romantic occasions. Make your party event a big hit
Convenience: Easy to inflate using the balloon pump, it can be air or helium filled. This balloon is self sealing so no tying with fingers required
Warm Tips: Foil balloons have self sealing valve for easy inflation and deflation. It can be inflated with air or helium. Please avoid filling more than 90% of air or helium
